title: verbascum × zakynthicum
intro: Verbascum × zakynthicum, also known as Zakynthos Mullein, is a hybrid plant species within the Mullein genus, derived from the natural hybridization of Verbascum lychnitis and Verbascum phoeniceum. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and expectorant effects, making it a popular treatment for respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Verbascum × zakynthicum include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for stress relief and insomnia. In terms of herbal preparations, Verbascum × zakynthicum can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
